svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="sensor-flow" name="MCU Sensor Acquisition Data Flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-322" dy="-193" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="600" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="MCU Sensor Acquisition Data Flow" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="10" width="400" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="timer" value="Timer ISR
(per-channel rate)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="55" width="200" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="adc_start" value="adc_driver_start_scan()" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="135" width="200" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dma" value="DMA Transfer
(ADC registers to adc_dma_buffer)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="210" width="200" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="check" value="adc_driver_scan_complete()
returns true" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="185" y="290" width="210" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="process" value="sensor_acq_process()" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="390" width="380" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" value="1. adc_driver_get_raw()
 Read raw uint16_t values" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="445" width="380" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" value="2. calibration_table[ch](raw)
 Convert to engineering units (float)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="490" width="380" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" value="3. Update latest_readings[] cache
 Static array, no heap" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="535" width="380" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" value="4. sensor_acq_encode_message()
 nanopb encode to SensorData protobuf" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="580" width="380" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="send" value="tcp_stack_send(TCP:5001)
to Linux Gateway" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="645" width="200" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="et1" style="strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="timer" target="adc_start" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="et1l" value="trigger" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#b85450;" parent="et1" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="et2" style="strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="adc_start" target="dma" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="et2l" value="DMA" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#9673a6;" parent="et2" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="et3" style="strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="dma" target="check" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="et4" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="check" target="process" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="et4l" value="true" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#82b366;" parent="et4" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="et5" style="strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s4" target="send" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
